description: Crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, kiara bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its two-tone leatherite and blended upper and elegant metallic hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensemble. Expand your bag collection with this accessory. Height: 33 cmWidth: 40 cmDepth: 13 cmBlended upper with a  leatherite overlay detail and a metallic badgeTwo handlesOne zippered compartment with two zippered pockets and two insert pockets for enhanced spaceZippered pocket on the front with two elasticated side pocketsBag careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
